kirundi.no_major_event_routine_fieldwork_stead: Nta gikorwa gikomeye. Akazi gasanzwe ko mu murima, iterambere rihamye.
kirundi.the_watershed_is_healing_across_the_bo: Akarere k'amazi karikira ku mpande zose. Inkomoko z'amazi zikonje kandi zisukuye. Umugezi munini wongeye gutwara amafi. Ibishanga by'imisamba bikora akazi k'ikibaya cy'umwuzure. Uku ni ko gusubirana ku rwego rw'akarere k'amazi bigaragara igihe igihe n'umuryango bihuriye hamwe.
kirundi.most_components_are_improving_a_few_st: Ibice byinshi biratera imbere. Bike biracyakeneye akazi. Inzira ni nziza kandi umuryango urakora.
kirundi.some_wins_some_gaps_real_watershed_wor: Intsinzi zimwe, icyuho kimwe. Akazi nyako k'akarere k'amazi gakunda kutaba kimwe; ibice bimwe byateye imbere mu gihe ibindi byahagaze.
kirundi.average_quality_is_low_and_few_compone: Ubuziranenge bw'impuzandengo buri hasi kandi ibice bike byageze ku rwego rwo gusubirana. Uku ni ko uturere tw'amazi twangirika mu ituze igihe imicungire idashobora gukurikirana imitwaro.
kirundi.initial_conditions_look_workable_use_y: Imimerere y'itangiriro isa nk'ishoboka. Koresha Umwaka wa 1 ku gukurikirana siyanse y'abaturage n'uburezi, kubaka inkunga y'umuryango mbere yo kuyikoresha ku bikorwa biteye impaka nko gukuraho urugomero.
kirundi.year_by_year_quality_trend_chart_by_wa: Igishushanyo cy'icyerekezo cy'ubuziranenge umwaka ku mwaka hakurikijwe igice cy'akarere k'amazi
kirundi.ai_watershed_educator_is_reading_your_: ⏳ Umwarimu w'akarere k'amazi wa AI arimo gusoma amakuru yawe y'akarere k'amazi...
kirundi.ai_watershed_science_educator: Umwarimu wa siyanse y'akarere k'amazi wa AI.
kirundi.it_is_not_a_wabanaki_person_not_a_real: Si umuntu wa Wabanaki, si umuhuzabikorwa nyawe w'akarere k'amazi cyangwa umuhanga mu by'amazi, kandi ntavuga mu izina ry'ihanga, ikigo cyangwa umuryango wa Wabanaki uwo ari wo wose.
kirundi.for_authoritative_voices_on_maine_wate: Ku majwi afite ububasha kuri akazi k'akarere k'amazi ka Maine, baza Penobscot Nation Cultural and Historic Preservation Department, Wabanaki Public Health and Wellness, Atlantic Salmon Federation, Maine Coast Heritage Trust, Maine Audubon, Maine Soil and Water Conservation Districts, na Maine Department of Environmental Protection.
kirundi.watershed_steward_maine_campaign: 💧 Umurinzi w'Akarere k'Amazi: kampanye ya Maine
kirundi.watershed_steward_10_year_maine_campai: Umurinzi w'Akarere k'Amazi: kampanye ya Maine y'imyaka 10
kirundi.six_watershed_components_ten_years_rea: Ibice bitandatu by'akarere k'amazi, imyaka icumi, imitwaro nyayo ya Maine: inzitizi z'imigomero, amazi atemba avuye mu buhinzi, amazi y'imvura yo mu nkengero z'umujyi, imyuzure n'amapfa biterwa n'ikirere.
kirundi.healthy_buffers_cool_headwater_streams: Uturere tw'inkingi tuzima tukonjesha imigezi y'inkomoko. Ibishanga by'imisamba bigabanya imyuzure kandi bisukura umugezi munini. Amazi make atemba avuye mu buhinzi yemerera uruzi guhumeka. Inzuzi zihujwe, zifite igicucu zigarura ukwimuka kwa salmon na alewife.
kirundi.what_if_you_had_done_nothing_for_10_ye: ↔ Byagenda bite uramutse utakoze ikintu mu myaka 10?
kirundi.ask_ai_watershed_educator_to_read_your: Saba umwarimu w'akarere k'amazi wa AI gusoma amakuru yawe y'akarere k'amazi
kirundi.ai_watershed_science_educator_reads_yo: Umwarimu wa siyanse y'akarere k'amazi wa AI asoma uko umeze ubu
kirundi.no_actions_yet_this_year_pick_a_compon: Nta bikorwa biracyabaho uyu mwaka. Hitamo igice, hitamo uburyo.
kirundi.insufficient_condensation_too_warm_or_: Iyegeranya ritihagije — bishyushye cyane cyangwa byumye cyane.
kirundi.slow_condensation_steady_but_gentle_pr: Iyegeranya rigenda buhoro. Imvura ihamye ariko yoroheje.
kirundi.high_moisture_cool_temp_strong_lift_he: Ubushuhe buri hejuru + ubushyuhe bukonje + kuzamuka gukomeye → imvura ikomeye ya convective.
kirundi.adjust_cloud_moisture_temperature_and_: Hindura ubushuhe bw'igicu, ubushyuhe n'umuyaga. Igikoresho gishyira imvura mu bwoko bune butandukanye. Nta manota, nta kwerekana — sunika kandi witegereze.
kirundi.hypothesis_free_text_what_triggers_a_s: Igitekerezo (inyandiko yisanzuye): Ni iki gitera umuyaga ugereranyije n'imvura yoroheje?
kirundi.hold_two_sliders_steady_move_one_watch: Fata ibinyereza bibiri bihamye. Imura kimwe. Witegereze.
kirundi.find_two_settings_producing_the_same_t: Shaka amagenamiterere abiri akora ubwoko bumwe.
kirundi.real_storms_need_both_moisture_and_ins: Imiyaga nyayo ikeneye ubushuhe no kutaba bihamye byombi. Kora iperereza.
kirundi.explain_how_moisture_temperature_and_w: Sobanura uko ubushuhe, ubushyuhe n'umuyaga bifatanya kugena ubwoko bw'imvura.
kirundi.design_note_discrete_4_type_precipitat: Inyandiko y'igishushanyo: ikimenyetso cy'imvura gitandukanye cy'ubwoko 4; nta manota y'igipimo cy'imvura; nta kwerekana — ku bushake.
kirundi.water_cycle_keyboard_shortcuts_1_throu: Uruziga rw'Amazi. Inzira ngufi za clavier: 1 kugeza 6 zihitamo intambwe, J ihindura uburyo bw'Urugendo, R U P bihitamo inzira y'urugendo rwawe.
kirundi.switch_to_watershed_steward_10_year_ca: Hindukira ku kampanye y'Umurinzi w'Akarere k'Amazi y'imyaka 10
kirundi.switch_to_precipitation_discovery_widg: Hindukira ku gikoresho cyo Kuvumbura imvura
kirundi.ride_one_droplet_from_the_ocean_back_t: urira igitonyanga kimwe uvuye mu nyanja usubira mu nyanja. Uzatangira mu nyanja, uhindagurike, urerere mu gicu, ugwe nk'imvura, hanyuma uhitemo inzira ku butaka (amazi atemba y'uruzi, kwinjira munsi y'ubutaka cyangwa kunyunyuzwa n'ikimera). Buri nzira ifata igihe gitandukanye. Soza uruziga kugira ngo wandike urugendo; uruziga 3 rufungura ikirango cy'Urugendo.
kirundi.you_rode_the_same_water_molecule_the_w: Wariye molekile imwe y'amazi inzira yose — yahinduye ishusho (amazi → umwuka → amazi) ariko ntiyigeze iremwa cyangwa isenywa. Buri gitonyanga unywa cyazengurutse imyaka miriyari.
kirundi.choose_river_runoff_path_shortcut_r: Hitamo inzira y'Amazi atemba y'uruzi (inzira ngufi: R)
kirundi.choose_underground_infiltration_path_s: Hitamo inzira yo Kwinjira munsi y'ubutaka (inzira ngufi: U)
kirundi.choose_plant_absorption_path_shortcut_: Hitamo inzira yo Kunyunyuzwa n'ikimera (inzira ngufi: P)
kirundi.become_a_water_droplet_and_travel_thro: Ba igitonyanga cy'amazi maze ugende mu ruziga rw'amazi rwose! Hitamo kuri buri ntambwe wige siyanse iri inyuma ya buri ihindagurika.
kirundi.ask_the_ai_hydrologist_tutor: Baza umwarimu w'umuhanga mu by'amazi wa AI
kirundi.water_is_conserved_runoff_what_soaks_i: 💧 Amazi arabikwa — amazi atemba + ayinjira ≈ 100% by'imvura igera ku butaka. Nta kintu cyburirwa; afata gusa inzira zitandukanye asubira mu nyanja.
